LightningComponentBundle.description: Classification / prediction score from Flow, driver and recommendation JSON lists, optional Prompt Builder summary.

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Main card title
property.description: Heading above the score bar (e.g. Attrition likelihood, Fraud risk).

property.name: factorsSectionTitle
property.label: Top drivers section title
property.description: Heading for the factors / SHAP-style list from your flow JSON.

property.name: recommendationsSectionTitle
property.label: Recommendations section title
property.description: Heading for the recommendations list from your flow JSON.

property.name: summaryCardTitle
property.label: AI summary card title
property.description: Heading for the Prompt Builder / Einstein narrative card.

property.name: flowApiName
property.label: Autolaunched flow API name
property.description: API name of the flow that returns prediction, factors, and recommendations.

property.name: recordIdInputName
property.label: Flow input variable for record Id
property.description: Name of the flow input variable that receives the current record Id.

property.name: factorsPositiveMeansGood
property.label: Top predictors: treat positive % as good
property.description: Unchecked (default): positive contribution uses risk color; negative uses good color. Checked: invert.

property.name: recommendationsPositiveMeansGood
property.label: Recommendations: treat positive % as good
property.description: Unchecked (default): positive uses risk color; negative uses good color. Checked: invert.

property.name: riskColor
property.label: Default risk color
property.description: Global default for risk-style deltas and bar fills when a section override is blank.

property.name: goodColor
property.label: Default good color
property.description: Global default for good-style deltas and bar fills when a section override is blank.

property.name: factorsRiskColor
property.label: Top predictors: risk color override
property.description: Optional. When set, Top predictors use this instead of Default risk color.

property.name: factorsGoodColor
property.label: Top predictors: good color override
property.description: Optional. When set, Top predictors use this instead of Default good color.

property.name: recommendationsRiskColor
property.label: Recommendations: risk color override
property.description: Optional. When set, Suggested improvements use this instead of Default risk color.

property.name: recommendationsGoodColor
property.label: Recommendations: good color override
property.description: Optional. When set, Suggested improvements use this instead of Default good color.

property.name: gaugeSubtitle
property.label: Gauge subtitle (under score)
property.description: Short label under the percentage (e.g. Churn probability, Fraud risk, Win likelihood).

property.name: gaugeArcBadColor
property.label: Gauge arc color (0% score — bad / risk)
property.description: Hex for the low end of the arc (e.g. #E74C3C). If blank, uses Gauge low color below, then default red.

property.name: gaugeArcGoodColor
property.label: Gauge arc color (100% score — good)
property.description: Hex for the high end of the arc (e.g. #1D9E75). If blank, uses Gauge high color below, then default green.

property.name: gaugeGradientReverse
property.label: Gauge: reverse arc colors
property.description: Unchecked: score 0% uses bad color, 100% uses good color. Checked: invert (high score toward bad color).

property.name: gaugeColorLow
property.label: Gauge fallback: low / bad color
property.description: Optional hex used when Gauge arc bad color is blank (e.g. #E74C3C). Default red if blank.

property.name: gaugeColorMid
property.label: Gauge (legacy — unused for solid arc)
property.description: Reserved for future use; solid arc only uses bad and good endpoints.

property.name: gaugeColorHigh
property.label: Gauge fallback: high / good color
property.description: Optional hex used when Gauge arc good color is blank (e.g. #1D9E75). Default green if blank.

property.name: promptTemplateId
property.label: Prompt template Id or API name
property.description: Required for the AI summary card. Einstein / Prompt Builder template Id or API name.

property.name: promptInputApiName
property.label: Prompt template text input API name
property.description: Must match a flex text input on the template; include the Input: prefix.

property.name: autoGenerateSummary
property.label: Auto-generate AI summary
property.description: When true (default), runs the prompt after the flow when a template Id is set.

property.name: recordIdInputName
property.label: Flow input variable for record Id

property.name: factorsPositiveMeansGood
property.label: Top predictors: treat positive % as good

property.name: gaugeArcBadColor
property.label: Gauge arc color (0% score — bad / risk)

property.name: promptTemplateId
property.label: Prompt template Id or API name

property.name: promptInputApiName
property.label: Prompt template text input API name

property.name: flowApiName
property.label: Autolaunched flow API name
property.description: Required at runtime for predictions; set in App Builder when using this component on a home page.

property.name: recordIdInputName
property.label: Flow input variable for record Id

property.name: factorsPositiveMeansGood
property.label: Top predictors: treat positive % as good

property.name: gaugeArcBadColor
property.label: Gauge arc color (0% score — bad / risk)

property.name: promptTemplateId
property.label: Prompt template Id or API name

property.name: promptInputApiName
property.label: Prompt template text input API name
